mapper.select:
SELECT
TRUNC(sensing_time, 'HH24') TRUNC(sensing_time, 'DD') TRUNC(sensing_time, 'MM') AS sensing_time,
ROUND(AVG(temperature), 1) AS temperature, ROUND(AVG(humidity), 1) AS humidity, ROUND(AVG((1023 - illumination) / 1023 * 100), 1) AS illumination, ROUND(AVG((1023 - soil_moisture) / 1023 * 100), 1) AS soil_moisture
FROM tbl_myplant_statistics WHERE myplant_id = #{myplant_id}
AND sensing_time >= SYSDATE - 1 AND sensing_time >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) AND sensing_time >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)
GROUP BY
TRUNC(sensing_time, 'HH24') TRUNC(sensing_time, 'DD') TRUNC(sensing_time, 'MM')
ORDER BY sensing_time ASC
